title: Small Businesses
metaTitle: Free ERP & Invoicing Software for Small Businesses · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: One free platform for invoicing, stock, payments and books for small businesses worldwide. Start free, add modules as you grow. Multi-currency, multi-language.
keywords: small business software, free erp small business, small business invoicing, all in one business software, sme accounting, multi-currency small business
heroTitle: One platform that grows with you
heroSubtitle: Start with free invoicing, then add stock, payroll and accounting only when you need them. Paper & Pen replaces a drawer of spreadsheets with one system that scales as you do.

features.title: Free invoicing
features.desc: Send invoices, quotes and receipts free forever, with no watermark or limits.

features.title: Quick to start
features.desc: Set up in minutes and send your first invoice the same day, no training.

features.title: Add stock control
features.desc: Switch on Inventory when you need real-time stock and low-stock alerts.

features.title: Add accounting
features.desc: Turn on full books and reports when you outgrow the spreadsheet.

features.title: Get paid online
features.desc: Add payment links so customers pay by card the moment they get the invoice.

features.title: Multi-currency
features.desc: Trade in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR or any currency, in five languages.

sections.title: Free today, ready for tomorrow
sections.body: Most small businesses begin with one need: send a professional invoice and get paid. Paper & Pen does that free forever, then grows with you. When stock starts to slip, switch on Inventory. When payroll gets fiddly, add HR. When you need real books and reports, turn on Accounting. You never pay for modules you don't use, and you never outgrow the platform.
items: Free invoicing, quotes and receipts to start
Add Inventory, HR or Accounting on demand

sections.title: Any currency, any language, any tax
sections.body: A small business does not stay in one market. Paper & Pen handles any currency with correct decimals, any tax rate, and five languages including Arabic and English, so you can sell across borders from day one. Built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR and 5% VAT, and just as at home with USD, EUR or GBP. Local support and Paymob payments come as a bonus for GCC businesses.
items: GCC VAT and Paymob payments built in

faqs.q: What do I get for free?
faqs.a: The Sales and Invoicing module is free forever: unlimited invoices, quotes, receipts, a client CRM and payment tracking, with no watermark or limit.

faqs.q: What do I pay for as I grow?
faqs.a: Add paid modules only when you need them: Inventory for stock, HR/Payroll for staff, Accounting for full books, Manufacturing and Reports. You never pay for what you don't use.
No. Paper & Pen scales from a one-person business to a multi-branch operation on the same platform, so you never have to migrate to a different system.

faqs.q: Does it work outside the GCC?
faqs.a: Yes. It works in any currency, any tax rate and five languages, so small businesses anywhere in the world can run on it.
Minutes. Create a workspace, add your logo and details, and send your first invoice the same day with no training required.

ctaTitle: One system from day one to scale
ctaSub: Start free with invoicing and add stock, payroll and accounting whenever your business is ready.
